title: Cook for her, she picks the meal
desc: You pick absolutely anything — no limits — and I’ll cook it properly from scratch. You don’t lift a finger, just relax while I handle everything start to finish (yes, even the washing up).

title: Flowers
desc: A surprise bunch of your favourite flowers, picked just for you. No occasion, no reason — just because you deserve something nice.

title: Breakfast in Bed
desc: You stay cosy in bed while I make your favourite breakfast and bring it to you. No rushing, no getting up — just slow, comfy morning vibes.

title: Date Night [out]
desc: We’re going out properly — your choice of where, what, and how. I’ll handle everything else so you can just enjoy the night with me.

title: Takeaway [her pick]
desc: You choose exactly what you’re craving and I’ll sort it. No back-and-forth — just your favourite food, sorted.

title: Surprise Gift
desc: A mystery gift picked just for you. No hints — just something I know will make you smile.

title: Massage Night
desc: A proper, slow, no-rush massage. Calm music, relaxed vibes — your only job is to switch off and enjoy it.

title: Coffee Walk
desc: We grab your favourite coffee and go for a chilled walk together. No distractions, just us talking and enjoying the moment.

title: Netflix and No Phones
desc: We pick something to watch, phones go away, and it’s just us. No scrolling, no distractions — proper time together.

title: Chocolates
desc: Your favourite chocolates, no sharing required. Simple, sweet, and exactly what you want.

title: Homemade Pizzas
desc: Make each other homemade pizza's, dough too!
